Not to mention tossing the debit machine across the counter at me. Not pleased with that kind of customer service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"jed Rudolph","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKEm3OtNEqF4WnCF0EpQsiqrf0RP1gHkwKpsNkVpz9u3Uj9Dj8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If a guy walks into a hardware store with an orange jumpsuit that has reflectors on it, an engine oil stained toque, whole body covered in sawdust, a carpentry pencil protruding from his front pocket, and a tidy black bag with a clipboard sticking out, what would you guess that guy is? If you guessed "carpenter", you'd be right. If you guessed "shoplifter", then you'd be just as dumb as the Sherlock Holmes wannabe who asked me to leave my bag at the till. I, for one, don't shop at places where I'm erroneously judged negatively for my appearance then immediately insulted, and neither should you.

I mean seriously, what shoplifter carries a clipboard!? Does he think I'm taking inventory of the stuff I'm supposedly stealing? Give me a break.

Big ups to Rona who now has my money instead.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ken and Amy Carlson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDjba4P6Ci8nsQju1rK2TjomDVdPMnTxsivVADjev5sXNlAA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"One stop shop for everything home improvement related.

A great selection of power tools and do it yourself equipment. Reasonable prices on everything and great deals on select items.

The back lot has all the lumber and building supplies you might need for any size project.

Plumbing and specialty items are also available. Almost anything you could want can also be ordered in very quickly.

Knowledgeable staff, and specialists in paint, building materials, and general hardware make getting the right items a breeze.

A great local business that provides quality service and products.","Images":null,"When":""}]
